**What M365 service or data would you like monitored?**
e.g. Exchange mailbox audit, Teams channel activity, SharePoint permissions

**What problem does this solve for you as an M365 admin?**

**Is there a Microsoft Graph API endpoint that provides this data?**
(Optional — link if you know it)

**Any examples from other tools (AdminDroid, Defender portal, Entra, etc.)?**
